hero.description: MetaIntelligence identifies the structure of hard problems and turns it into verifiable AI software. Manufacturing vision inspection, document and knowledge analysis, and decision support are designed from one engineering principle.

structure.description: Frame the domain, data, and operating constraints.

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: Keep outputs tied to sources, checks, and review loops.

glance.title: Focused AI systems with reviewable outputs
glance.description: The homepage presents the core direction and entry points compactly, with detailed material available in each solution and technology page.

multimodal.title: Multimodal AI

company.shortDescription: MetaIntelligence builds First-Principle AI software for domain signal intelligence, manufacturing vision inspection, and source-grounded knowledge workflows. The company focuses on systems whose outputs can be traced, tested, and operated in real workflows.
company.headquarters: 4F #401, 13 Alphacity 1-ro 35-gil, Suseong-gu, Daegu, Republic of Korea

mainStats.founded: Founded as a software and AI company
mainStats.patent: Registered patent for natural data analysis

first.title: First-Principle AI
first.label: Model the structure first
first.description: We begin with the physical, statistical, or operational structure of a problem before selecting models and automation layers.

verification.title: Verification-Driven
verification.label: Keep outputs traceable
verification.description: Generated insights are connected to source data, reproducible calculations, and reviewable operating procedures.

open.title: Open Architecture
open.label: Fit the customer environment
open.description: Pipelines are designed to integrate with existing data, models, deployment constraints, and multiple LLM providers.

multimodal.title: Multimodal AI
multimodal.subtitle: Vision-language fusion and physics-informed modeling
multimodal.description: Computer vision, image generation, document understanding, and structured signals are combined for industrial AI workflows.

knowledge.title: Knowledge AI
knowledge.subtitle: Agentic AI and document intelligence
knowledge.description: Technical documents and structured datasets are converted into searchable knowledge, grounded summaries, and report-ready insights.

hpc.title: HPC & Optimization
hpc.subtitle: Hybrid computing and large-scale data pipelines
hpc.description: Large datasets, GPU workloads, and deployment pipelines are engineered as part of the product, not left as lab-only prototypes.

signal.title: Signal Intelligence
signal.subtitle: Configurable trend and risk discovery
signal.description: Text fields, dates, amounts, groups, and temporal signals are analyzed to reveal domain-specific momentum.

mvi.summary: A field-adaptive inspection workflow that combines one-class anomaly detection, targeted data augmentation, and 3-BIN human-in-the-loop operation.
mvi.proof: Validated on anomaly detection workflows including MVTec AD experiments and manufacturing PoC scenarios.
mvi.detail: Normal-data learning, targeted GenAI augmentation, 3-BIN review, and legacy-friendly deployment are organized as one field workflow.

metainsight.summary: A configurable platform for collecting, cleaning, clustering, scoring, and reporting large-scale domain datasets with evidence-linked outputs.
metainsight.proof: Built from repeated public R&D analytics work, then generalized into a domain-configurable trend and insight engine.
metainsight.detail: Collection, cleansing, vectorization, clustering, scoring, and insight generation stay connected to source records and reviewable evidence.

diana.summary: An agent layer for query planning, evidence retrieval, calculation checks, and draft outputs on top of structured domain data and documents.
diana.proof: Designed to extend MetaInsight pipelines into grounded, repeatable knowledge-work automation.
diana.detail: A guided agent layer turns structured evidence into intelligence units, draft reports, review notes, and verification logs.

metainsightMfg.description: A manufacturing analytics extension that connects MES, sensor, ERP, inspection, and 4M logs into diagnosis and reporting workflows.

aeroGimbal.description: A vision AI concept for tracking high-speed moving objects and linking perception to gimbal control in operational environments.

rnd.title: Repeated public R&D analytics projects
rnd.description: Analyzed domestic and global R&D funding, emerging research topics, and technology signals across multiple yearly projects.

patent.title: Registered patent KR 10-2573563
patent.description: Registered intellectual property for a natural data analysis system and method, forming a basis for R&D intelligence workflows.

prototype.title: MetaInsight prototype and workflow demonstrations
prototype.description: Expanded large-scale R&D analytics pipelines into web-based workflows for filtering, clustering, insight review, and reporting.

vision.title: MicroDIPS-based vision anomaly detection validation
vision.description: Extended normal-data-based anomaly detection and data augmentation methods toward manufacturing vision AI use cases.

expansion.title: Manufacturing, aerospace, and LLM workflow expansion
expansion.description: Developing applied product directions around MVI, MetaInsight MFG, AeroGimbal-Track, and agentic domain intelligence.

ceo.specialty: Physics-informed AI and integrated AI architecture
ceo.summary: Ph.D. in physics from POSTECH. Experience across machine vision engineering, CSAIC research, and registered AI analytics IP.

nlp.specialty: Language models, evaluation, and report generation
nlp.summary: Leads grounded document analysis, LLM evaluation, and agent workflows for domain intelligence and technical reporting.

software.summary: Builds product-grade software architecture for vision AI demos, analytics interfaces, and enterprise-ready workflows.

vision.summary: Develops inspection logic, synthetic data strategies, and model evaluation pipelines for manufacturing vision scenarios.

quality.summary: Supports collection, cleansing, validation, and structured operation of large-scale datasets.

natural.title: Natural data analysis system
natural.description: Registered patent KR 10-2573563 covers a method for analyzing technical and natural data through structured interpretation.

physics.title: R&D grants data physics
physics.description: A quantitative approach for analyzing global R&D records such as NSF, NIH, NTIS, KAKEN, and CORDIS datasets.

signal.title: Emerging technology signal pipeline
signal.description: Clustering, temporal signals, quantitative indicators, and LLM-based evaluation are combined to identify emerging technology candidates.

public.title: Public research presentations
public.description: Research activities include R&D funding analytics, future issue discovery, and related presentation or report work.

companyIntro.metaDescription: A concise introduction to MetaIntelligence Inc.

companyIdentity.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence company identity, mission, values, and operating principles.
companyIdentity.title: AI products designed for verification, deployment, and repeat use
companyIdentity.description: MetaIntelligence Inc. develops software for manufacturing vision inspection, domain signal intelligence, and source-grounded document workflows. The company prioritizes traceability and operating fit over generic AI claims.
companyIdentity.missionTitle: Build AI systems that can be checked before they are trusted
companyIdentity.missionDescription: In industrial and research workflows, a useful AI output must remain connected to data, assumptions, and review steps. MetaIntelligence designs products around that requirement from the start.
companyIdentity.competenciesTitle: Technical capabilities that reinforce each other
companyIdentity.nextDescription: The company is presented through repeated work, registered IP, and applied product directions.

culture.metaDescription: How MetaIntelligence works as a focused AI engineering team.
culture.title: A focused engineering culture for verifiable AI
culture.description: MetaIntelligence presents culture through how the team works: evidence-based decisions, working software, clear ownership, and respect for real operating constraints.

evidence.title: Evidence before opinion
evidence.description: Technical choices are judged by source data, reproducible outputs, and deployment constraints rather than preference or fashion.

software.title: Working software first
software.description: Research results matter when they become usable systems. We keep prototypes close to product workflows and field operation.

ownership.title: Small team, clear ownership
ownership.description: Responsibilities are kept explicit across research, data, product, and deployment so that decisions remain accountable.

security.title: Respect for security and field limits
security.description: Manufacturing and public-sector environments come with network, data, hardware, and review constraints. Product design starts there.

culture.standardTitle: We prove value through operating systems, not presentation layers alone
culture.standardDescription: In R&D analytics, this means preserving the path from source records to final insight. In manufacturing vision AI, it means connecting models to feedback, retraining, and field decision procedures.

missionHistory.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence milestones, company history, and verified execution record.
missionHistory.title: From R&D analytics to applied AI products
missionHistory.description: The company history is presented through public-safe facts: repeated research execution, registered IP, product prototypes, and the transition toward manufacturing and agentic AI.

founded.title: Company founded
founded.description: Metacomputing Inc. was founded with a focus on computational science, AI, and data analytics.

analytics.title: Public R&D analytics work begins
analytics.description: The team entered R&D intelligence through funded research on global R&D project data and data science methods.

patent.title: Registered patent secured
patent.description: Patent KR 10-2573563 was registered for a natural data analysis system and method.

prototype.title: MetaInsight prototype
prototype.description: R&D collection, cleansing, analytics, and report-generation workflows were expanded into a web-based prototype.

rename.title: Company name changed to MetaIntelligence
rename.description: The company repositioned around enterprise AI products from its base in Daegu Suseong Alpha City.

expansion.title: Manufacturing and agentic AI expansion
expansion.description: Product directions are expanding around MVI, MetaInsight MFG, DIANA, and applied AI workflows for industry.

contact.metaDescription: Contact MetaIntelligence Inc. in Daegu, Republic of Korea.
contact.title: Project and collaboration inquiries
contact.description: Contact MetaIntelligence for manufacturing vision AI, domain signal intelligence, and grounded document-analysis workflows. Please avoid sending resident registration numbers, home addresses, or other unnecessary sensitive personal data.
contact.scopeTitle: Areas where the team can respond most effectively

scope.mvi: Manufacturing defect detection, vision inspection workflows, data augmentation, and field deployment.
scope.metainsight: Domain signal analytics, trend discovery, clustering, and evidence-linked reporting.
scope.diana: Agentic document intelligence, retrieval workflows, LLM evaluation, and report automation.

trackRecord.description: This page summarizes public-safe execution signals: repeated projects, large-scale data experience, registered IP, and applied industry directions. Confidential customer details are intentionally excluded.

global.description: Large-scale collection, structuring, and analysis of public R&D records.

construction.description: Participation in consortium-based work for public R&D information analysis.

collaboration.mvi: Vision inspection automation for display and film process scenarios
collaboration.mfg: Manufacturing-data-based diagnosis and report automation agent
collaboration.aero: High-speed visual tracking and gimbal-control integration concept

research.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence research, intellectual property, and publication highlights.
research.title: Research methods and IP behind the product direction
research.description: MetaIntelligence connects natural data analysis, R&D data physics, emerging technology discovery, and manufacturing vision AI into a verification-driven technical foundation.

patent.title: Registered patent KR 10-2573563
patent.description: Natural data analysis system and method. The IP supports the company approach to structured analysis of R&D and technical data.

trademark.title: Registered trademark KR 40-1914547
trademark.description: Trademark asset from the earlier MetaCom2 period, retained as part of the company history and public IP context.

record.title: Applied research record
record.description: Research activity is presented as technical context only; confidential contracts and private partner details are excluded.

research.publicationsTitle: Research activity that supports the platform direction

publications.future: Future-issue analysis based on collection and analysis of global R&D funding status
publications.pittcon: Pittcon poster presentation on R&D funding data and future issue discovery
publications.nsf: Big-data analysis of NSF project abstracts and data-physics methodology
publications.reports: Public R&D analytics reports built from policy research assignments

solutions.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence solution portfolio across MetaInsight, MVI, DIANA, and selective collaboration extensions.
solutions.title: A focused portfolio for signal, vision, and source-grounded intelligence
solutions.description: MetaIntelligence presents three public product lines and a small set of collaboration extensions. Each item below opens selectively for deeper context while keeping the page focused.

publicNotes.mvi1: Normal-data-based anomaly detection for scarce defect-data environments.
publicNotes.mvi2: Targeted GenAI augmentation for product-state and defect examples.
publicNotes.mvi3: 3-BIN review and human feedback loop for field-adaptive operation.
publicNotes.metainsight1: Collection, cleansing, clustering, and signal scoring for configurable domain datasets.
publicNotes.metainsight2: Evidence-linked screens for analyst review, not opaque report generation.
publicNotes.metainsight3: Built from repeated public R&D analytics execution, then generalized as a domain signal engine.
publicNotes.diana1: Agentic layer on top of structured domain data, documents, and source evidence.
publicNotes.diana2: Designed for source-grounded intelligence units, reports, and review notes.
publicNotes.diana3: Uses verification steps to reduce unsupported generation and numerical errors.

solutions.methodTitle: Source-grounded verification is the shared layer
solutions.methodDescription: The same principle appears in domain signal analytics, document workflows, and operating analytics: data enters as structured evidence, calculations are separated from generation, and outputs remain reviewable.

input.title: Structured Input
input.description: Records, documents, dates, groups, and source identifiers enter as evidence.

reasoning.title: Separated Reasoning
reasoning.description: Scoring, calculation, retrieval, and generation remain distinct steps.

output.title: Reviewable Output
output.description: Reports, briefs, and notes preserve evidence links and uncertainty markers.

solutions.extensionsDescription: These are presented as applied directions and collaboration capabilities, separate from the three public product lines.

mvi.metaDescription: MVI is MetaIntelligence manufacturing vision AI for one-class anomaly detection, GenAI augmentation, and field-adaptive inspection workflows.
mvi.title: Vision AI for manufacturing lines where defect data is scarce
mvi.description: MVI connects one-class anomaly detection, targeted data augmentation, and review operation into a workflow that can be adapted to real inspection environments.

ready.title: Ready-to-Run
ready.description: Start from normal production images and reduce the dependency on large initial defect datasets.

expert.title: Expert-Free Operation
expert.description: Combine 3-BIN review, human feedback, and structured retraining so operators can keep improving the workflow.

adaptive.title: Field-Adaptive
adaptive.description: Account for line changes, lighting shifts, and inspection feedback as part of the product workflow.

mvi.evidenceTitle: Inspection output is treated as reviewable evidence
mvi.evidenceDescription: MVI is framed as a production workflow: gather normal images, augment scarce cases, inspect candidates, and route uncertain results back into review.
mvi.evidenceAlt: MVI defect example and heatmap evidence
mvi.pipelineTitle: More than a detector: a production feedback loop

gate.title: Optical and Data Gate
gate.description: Check imaging conditions, line context, and data readiness before model training.

detect.title: One-Class Detection
detect.description: Detect anomaly candidates from normal-data-based learning and surface uncertain regions.

augment.title: Targeted Augmentation
augment.description: Use generative augmentation to enrich scarce defect and product-state examples.

operation.title: 3-BIN Operation
operation.description: Separate normal, uncertain, and defect cases while routing feedback into the learning loop.

mvi.demosTitle: Select a workflow step and play the demo
mvi.demosDescription: The selected video updates in place so each workflow step can be reviewed without crowding the page.

inspect.title: Defect inspection
inspect.description: Review anomaly candidates, heatmap output, and defect metadata in the inspection workflow.

good.title: Defect-to-good augmentation
good.description: Convert scarce defect examples into additional good-state training images for comparison.

defect.title: Good-to-defect augmentation
defect.description: Generate targeted defect-like examples from normal imagery to close the early data gap.

metainsight.metaDescription: MetaInsight is a domain-agnostic signal intelligence platform for data cleansing, clustering, trend scoring, and verified insight generation.
metainsight.title: Domain signal intelligence from large datasets to reviewable decisions
metainsight.description: MetaInsight collects and structures time-series domain data, clusters meaningful text fields, evaluates trend strength, and keeps generated insights linked to evidence. R&D is one proven domain, not the boundary of the platform.
metainsight.workflowTitle: One flow from domain data to validated signal

collect.title: Collect & Cleanse
collect.description: Normalize domain records, resolve missing fields, and prepare analysis-ready datasets from CSV, Excel, Parquet, or managed stores.

cluster.title: Vectorize & Cluster
cluster.description: Transform configurable text fields into semantic groups using hash, dense, or hybrid vectorization.

score.title: Score Signals
score.description: Evaluate sustained trend, momentum, and recent strength using domain-specific dates, amounts, and grouping fields.

insights.title: Generate Insights
insights.description: Create evidence-linked summaries, exportable tables, and review-ready intelligence statements from structured results.

metainsight.screensTitle: A focused screen tour with selectable evidence
metainsight.screensDescription: Select the screen that matches the analysis task. The image below updates in place so the page stays concise.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Review the total result set, representative clusters, and high-level signal distribution.

charts.title: Charts
charts.description: Inspect rankings, distribution patterns, and group comparisons through focused charts.

details.title: Details
details.description: Move from a cluster-level insight back to individual records and source-level evidence.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Convert analysis outputs into concise, reviewable intelligence statements.

metainsight.differentiationTitle: A bridge between analysis tools and final reports

quant.title: Quant evidence
quant.description: Signals are explained through cluster scores, trends, and source records.

repeatable.title: Repeatable exploration
repeatable.description: Analysts can change country, field, period, and organization filters without rebuilding work.

extension.title: Domain extension
extension.description: The same engine can support R&D projects, patents, retail trends, financial risks, and operational records.

diana.metaDescription: DIANA is the agentic intelligence layer on MetaInsight for source-grounded domain analysis and knowledge workflows.
diana.title: Agentic intelligence for repeatable domain analysis
diana.description: DIANA is the agent layer that extends MetaInsight from analytics into guided knowledge work. It is designed to retrieve evidence, plan domain-specific analysis steps, draft outputs, and preserve verification context.

evidence.title: Evidence Layer
evidence.body: Domain datasets, documents, logs, reports, and technical materials are normalized with source identifiers.

agent.title: Agent Layer
agent.body: Planning, retrieval, quantitative checks, and drafting are separated into reviewable agent tasks.

output.title: Output Layer
output.body: Briefs, review notes, and report drafts are produced with linked evidence and verification context.

agents.ingestion: Collect and structure domain records, documents, logs, reports, patents, and technical materials.
agents.analysis: Compute domain signals from clusters, trends, quantitative indicators, and operating rules.
agents.structuring: Organize definitions, evidence, applications, risks, and decisions into repeatable templates.
agents.crossCheck: Compare generated statements with source databases and retrieved evidence.
agents.preDetection: Surface candidate signals before they become obvious through manual review.
agents.guard: Reduce unsupported generation, numerical errors, and overconfident conclusions through evaluation gates.

diana.outputTitle: Outputs analysts can inspect and improve
diana.outputDescription: DIANA is not positioned as a free-form chatbot. Its value is in structuring evidence-backed intelligence units that can be reviewed, revised, and reused.

outputs.trend: Quantitative trend, risk, or opportunity review
outputs.crossMap: Cross-map across records, documents, reports, and source evidence

diana.verificationTitle: Generation is separated from evidence and calculation
diana.verificationDescription: DIANA is positioned around structured evidence, program-aided calculation, cross-checking, source tracking, and fallback behavior when confidence is insufficient.

input.title: Input Gate
input.description: Accept only structured records, source URIs, and analyst-approved context.

calculation.title: Calculation Gate
calculation.description: Run quantitative scoring and rule checks outside free-form generation.

retrieval.title: Retrieval Gate
retrieval.description: Attach supporting records before a claim enters the draft.

crossCheck.title: Cross-Check Gate
crossCheck.description: Compare conclusions against retrieved evidence and known domain rules.

review.title: Review Gate
review.description: Expose assumptions, weak signals, and missing evidence for analyst correction.

fallback.title: Fallback Gate
fallback.description: Defer or mark uncertainty when the evidence path is incomplete.

diana.positioningDescription: DIANA is planned as an extension of the same verified data foundation used by MetaInsight. The roadmap is aimed at domain signal analysis, policy research, risk review, technical intelligence, and enterprise document-analysis workflows.

strategy.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence solution strategy across flagship products and collaboration extensions.
strategy.title: Turning verified technical work into focused product lines
strategy.description: MetaIntelligence avoids presenting every possible AI idea as a product. The portfolio is organized around work that has a clear data foundation, operating workflow, and path to deployment.

prove.title: Prove the method through repeated work
prove.description: Public R&D analytics projects validated the foundation for data cleansing, clustering, signal analysis, and report workflows.

convert.title: Convert research into product lines
convert.description: MetaInsight and MVI organize the verified methods into repeatable software products rather than one-off demonstrations.

extend.title: Extend selectively into adjacent domains
extend.description: Manufacturing report automation, real-time visual tracking, and agentic analysis are presented as focused extensions.

strategy.extensionsDescription: Extension concepts are shown as technical direction and collaboration potential, separate from the flagship product lines.

ida.metaDescription: IDA has been consolidated into MetaInsight, the domain signal intelligence platform.
ida.title: IDA is now presented as MetaInsight
ida.description: The former document and research-data analytics experience has been consolidated into MetaInsight, the public domain signal intelligence platform page.

coreTech.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence core technical capabilities across multimodal AI, knowledge AI, HPC, and signal intelligence.
coreTech.title: Capabilities for AI systems that can be operated and verified
coreTech.description: MetaIntelligence focuses on the full path from data and modeling to review, deployment, and repeatable operation. The capability set is deliberately practical: multimodal AI, knowledge AI, scalable processing, and signal intelligence.
coreTech.pipelineTitle: Traceability is built into the pipeline
coreTech.pipelineDescription: Whether the input is an R&D database, a technical document, or an inspection image, the system keeps track of where evidence came from and how it was transformed.

philosophy.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence technology philosophy: first principles, verification, and open architecture.
philosophy.title: Trust comes from architecture, not from claims
philosophy.description: MetaIntelligence decomposes problems from first principles, constrains generated outputs with evidence, and designs systems that can be deployed inside the customer environment.
philosophy.guardrailsTitle: Reliability is expressed as system behavior

safeguards.source: Maintain a clear connection between source data and generated outputs.
safeguards.calculation: Prefer reproducible calculations and code-based checks where possible.
safeguards.llm: Use LLMs with retrieval, templates, evaluation, and review stages instead of free-form generation alone.
safeguards.deployment: Design deployment around real network, security, data, and hardware constraints.

csaicTeam.metaDescription: MetaIntelligence CSAIC team profiles focused on public technical roles and expertise.
csaicTeam.title: Computational science, AI research, and product engineering in one team
csaicTeam.description: CSAIC stands for Computational Science & AI Center, the research and product team behind MetaIntelligence. Public profiles are limited to role, expertise, and relevant professional background.
csaicTeam.systemTitle: Small enough to stay accountable, broad enough to build full systems

research.title: Research
research.description: First-principle modeling, R&D data analytics, algorithm design

product.title: Product
product.description: MVI, MetaInsight, and DIANA product workflows and user experience

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: Public R&D deliverables, data quality management, and pipeline reliability

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: LLM evaluation, source-data comparison, and grounded reporting

notFound.title: This page is not available.
notFound.description: The page may have moved as the MetaIntelligence website was reorganized.

terms.intro: This website is operated by MetaIntelligence Inc. for company introduction, technology overview, solution information, and contact purposes.
terms.content: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes. Product direction, research activities, and solution descriptions may be updated without prior notice.
terms.ip: All company names, solution names, text, images, videos, and other materials on this website belong to MetaIntelligence Inc. or their respective rights holders unless otherwise stated.
terms.links: This website may include links to external sites when necessary. MetaIntelligence Inc. is not responsible for the content, policies, or operation of external websites.
terms.prohibited: Visitors may not misuse the website, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, or copy materials in a way that infringes intellectual property rights.
terms.contact: For questions about these terms, contact:

privacy.intro: MetaIntelligence Inc. operates this website to introduce the company, its technology, and its solution portfolio.
privacy.collect1: This website does not provide member accounts or payment functions. We may receive information only when a visitor contacts us directly by email or phone.
privacy.collect2: Information voluntarily provided through an inquiry may include name, company, role, email address, phone number, and the content of the inquiry.
privacy.sensitive: Please do not send resident registration numbers, passport numbers, home addresses, financial account information, health information, or other unnecessary sensitive personal data.
privacy.use: We use inquiry information only to review and respond to business, partnership, research, or product-related requests.
privacy.retention: Inquiry information is retained only as long as reasonably necessary for communication, business review, legal compliance, or record management.
privacy.thirdParty: The website may use hosting, analytics, or security services required for operation. These services may process technical access data such as IP address, browser, device, and page access time.

hero.title: First-principle AI, built for reliable deployment
hero.subtitle: Verification-driven AI for manufacturing, signal intelligence, and data analytics.

identity.title: Identity
identity.content: MetaIntelligence builds software that identifies the structure of hard problems and turns it into reliable AI products.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To deliver AI systems whose outputs can be verified, operated, and trusted in real industrial and research environments.

slogan.title: Slogan
slogan.content: Insight into Essence, Design for Value
